calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petitioner: Chi Seng "Johnny" Au appeared with Counsel Akiko L. Takeshita.
Respondent: Fileon "Jhun" Cueva was not present.

Petitioner was sworn prior to the commencement of the hearing.

The Court stated that it was in receipt of the proof of service filed by Ms. Takeshita today and that it could proceed.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected person: Chi Seng "Johnny" Au, his Residence, and his job or workplace.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Threaten, Harass, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Persons.

Expires July 21, 2013.

Order signed in open court.
